mapper.select: SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND retailer_account_id = #{retailerId} AND status_id = 9)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND retailer_account_id = #{retailerId} AND status_id IN (8, 9))
INSERT INTO tb_order VALUES (DEFAULT, #{retailerId}, #{storeId}, 9, DEFAULT, DEFAULT) RETURNING id
SELECT id FROM tb_order WHERE retailer_account_id = #{retailerId} AND store_id = #{storeId} AND status_id = 9
SELECT id FROM tb_order WHERE retailer_account_id = #{retailerId} AND status_id = 9
SELECT store_id FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{cartId}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status_id = 9)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE status_id = 9 AND retailer_account_id = #{currentUserId})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE status_id = 9 AND retailer_account_id = #{retailerId} AND store_id != #{storeId})

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, (SELECT name FROM tb_store WHERE id = tb_order.store_id) AS storeName, (SELECT banner_image FROM tb_store WHERE id = tb_order.store_id) AS storeImage, (SELECT SUM(unit_price) FROM tb_order_detail WHERE order_id = tb_order.id) AS total FROM tb_order WHERE status_id = 9 AND retailer_account_id = #{currentUserId}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE id = #{productId} AND qty >= #{qty})
SELECT price FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE id = #{productId}
INSERT INTO tb_order_detail(id, order_id, qty, unit_price, store_product_id) VALUES (DEFAULT, #{orderId}, #{qty}, #{price}, #{storeProductId}) RETURNING 1

SELECT s.id AS productId, (SELECT name FROM tb_product WHERE id = s.product_id) AS productName, s.image, s.qty AS inStock, o.qty AS qty, s.price AS unitPrice, (o.qty * o.unit_price) AS subTotal FROM tb_order_detail o JOIN tb_store_product_detail s ON s.id = o.store_product_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.store_product_id = #{storeProductId}
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order_detail WHERE store_product_id = #{storeProductId} AND order_id = #{orderId})
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT s.id AS productId, (SELECT name FROM tb_product WHERE id = s.product_id) AS productName, s.image, s.qty AS inStock, o.qty AS qty, s.price AS unitPrice, (o.qty * o.unit_price) AS subTotal FROM tb_order_detail o JOIN tb_store_product_detail s ON s.id = o.store_product_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)
DELETE FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{orderId} AND status_id = 9 RETURNING 1
UPDATE tb_order SET status_id = 8 WHERE id = #{orderId} RETURNING 1
UPDATE tb_order SET status_id = 1 WHERE id = #{orderId} RETURNING 1

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE retailer_account_id = #{retailerId} AND status_id IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) ORDER BY created_date ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)

SELECT id, store_id AS storeId, retailer_account_id AS retailerId, created_date AS date, status_id FROM tb_order WHERE retailer_account_id = #{retailerId} AND status_id IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6) ORDER BY created_date DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageSize} * (#{pageNumber} - 1)
SELECT count(*) FROM tb_order WHERE retailer_account_id = #{retailerId} AND status_id IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{id} AND status_id = 4)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{id} AND status_id IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6))
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{id} AND status_id = 5)
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_order WHERE retailer_account_id = #{currentUserId} AND status_id = 3 AND id = #{id})
UPDATE tb_order SET status_id = 5 WHERE id = #{id} RETURNING 1
DELETE FROM tb_order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId} RETURNING 1
DELETE FROM tb_order WHERE id = #{orderId} RETURNING 1
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM tb_retailer_info WHERE retailer_account_id = #{retailerId})
SELECT id FROM tb_store_product_detail WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND id = #{productId}
